_comment: Baseline of historical destructive Prisma migrations accepted before the migration linter shipped. Each entry maps a relative migration path to the SHA-256 of its content. The linter (api/src/scripts/lint-migrations.ts) skips files whose hash matches; any edit to a baselined file invalidates its entry and re-flags the violations. NEW destructive migrations require ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE_MIGRATION=1 in CI plus a justification in the PR description.
_seeAlso: docs/DELIVERY_PLAN.md Week 1 Day 4; docs/DESIGN_IMPROVEMENT_DEEP_ANALYSIS.md additive-only-migrations standing rule.
